---
title: "HW5"
author: 'Ian Mulchrone'
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(pracma)
```

## Find inverse of the CDF:
$$F(x) = 1-(\frac{2}{x})^3, x \geq 2$$
$$u = 1-(\frac{2}{x})^3$$
$$u-1 = -(\frac{2}{x})^3$$
$$1-u = (\frac{2}{x})^3$$
$$\sqrt[3]{1-u} = \frac{2}{x}$$
$$x\sqrt[3]{1-u} = 2$$
$$x = \frac{2}{\sqrt[3]{1-u}}$$

## Generate 10 instances of F(x) using the inverse distribution transformation method.
```{r}
n = 10
u = runif(n) #generate n instances of U[0,1]
x = 2/nthroot(u,3) #F^-1(x) function
#if u ~ U[0,1] then 1-u ~ U[0,1]
#so 2/nthroot(1-u,3) is the same as 2/nthroot(u,3)
print(x)
```
